tiers.name: The E-Rank Awakening
tiers.arc: Nobody believed the weakest hunter would return to the gate. He returned anyway — and the System opened one eye.

tiers.name: The D-Rank Vanguard
tiers.arc: The white vapor at his feet has turned blue. Other hunters have started to ask what changed. The honest answer: every single session.

tiers.name: The C-Rank Assassin
tiers.arc: He no longer enters gates hoping to survive them. He enters to clear them. The cobalt glow does not flicker anymore.

tiers.name: The B-Rank Elite
tiers.arc: Runes burn along the dark armor now. The ground cracks where he plants his feet. The System has stopped issuing warnings — it issues challenges.

tiers.name: The A-Rank Vanguard
tiers.arc: Blue gave way to violet, the color of something the rankings were not designed to measure. The guilds keep his file open on every desk.

tiers.name: The S-Rank Necromancer
tiers.arc: The shadows answer him now. Every gate he has ever cleared marches silently behind him — the work was never lost, it was enlisted.

tiers.name: The Shadow Lord Awakening
tiers.arc: A crown of purple flame is forming above his head, and wings of shadow stretch where a tired man once stood. The System addresses him differently now.

tiers.name: The Monarch Candidate
tiers.arc: Reality bends politely out of his way. There are only a handful of beings at this altitude, and none of them got here by accident.

tiers.name: The Cosmic Sovereign
tiers.arc: His aura is no longer a glow; it is a weather system of stars. The gates that once tested him now open in deference.

tiers.name: The Absolute God of Shadows
tiers.arc: There is no rank above this. There is only the void, the white crown, and the quiet certainty of a body built one honest session at a time.
